subcodes.first_line: Most of the peoples of the world await expectantly, asking when the Sun of Truth will dawn from the horizon of the Divine Will. However, when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اکثری از اهل عالم منتظر که کی آفتاب حقیقت از افق مشیت اشراق نماید ولکن چون
